name: Angi Inc.
summary: OVERVIEW Who We Are Angi Inc. connects quality home professionals (Pros) with consumers across more than 500 different categories, from repairing and remodeling homes to cleaning and landscaping. There were approximately 111,000 Average Monthly Active Pros (as defined below) during the three months ended December 31, 2025.
